name: update_row
description: Modify an existing row in a Coda table by updating specific column values. Only specified columns are updated; other columns remain unchanged. Useful for status updates, progress tracking, and workflow automation.

parameters.name: docId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the Coda document containing the table.

parameters.name: tableId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the table containing the row.

parameters.name: rowId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the row to update.
